Vending Machine Location Finder

Find optimal locations for your vending machine business

Advanced Filters

Find Vending Machine Spots That Actually Make Money

We've built a tool that looks at tons of data to help you find the best spots for your vending machines. No guesswork, no wasted trips—just real locations where people actually want to buy snacks and drinks. Here's how we help you find the perfect spots.

How We Score Each Location

Every location gets a score from 0 to 100. We look at how many people walk by, what kind of place it is, whether there's already competition, and what other businesses are nearby. If a spot scores above 70, it's usually a winner—lots of foot traffic and not too many other machines around.

  • Overall Score: One number that tells you if a spot is worth your time
  • Foot Traffic Score: How many people actually walk by each day
  • Competition Check: We'll tell you if there's already a machine there
  • Nearby Businesses: Extra points if there are other busy places close by

See Who's Actually Walking By

Want to know who's going to buy from your machine? We'll show you how many people visit each spot, when they're busiest, and what age groups you're dealing with. This way you can stock the right products before you even set up shop.

  • Daily Visitors: How many people actually come through each day
  • Busiest Times: When the crowds show up (so you know when to restock)
  • Who's There: Age breakdowns so you know if you should stock energy drinks or coffee
  • Why It's Busy: We explain what makes a location popular

Check If Someone Already Beat You There

Nothing worse than showing up to a spot and finding out there's already a machine there. We check for existing machines and tell you if an area is too crowded or if there's still room for you. Find the spots where people want snacks but nobody's selling them yet.

  • Competition Check: We'll tell you right away if there's already a machine
  • How Crowded: Is the area packed with machines or wide open?
  • Your Chances: See if you can compete or if you should look elsewhere
  • Untapped Spots: Find places where people want snacks but can't get them

Search Exactly What You Want

Type in a zip code, city, or state and we'll find spots for you. Then use our filters to narrow it down—only show busy places, skip spots with competition, or focus on specific types like gyms or hospitals. Save yourself hours of driving around looking for the perfect spot.

  • Busy Places Only: Filter to show just the high-traffic spots
  • No Competition: Skip anywhere that already has a machine
  • Pick Your Type: Hospitals, gyms, airports, schools—whatever you're looking for
  • Quality Control: Only show locations that score above a certain number
  • Stay Close: Find spots within a certain distance from where you are
  • Traffic Requirements: Set how many daily visitors you need

See Every Spot on a Map

All your potential locations show up on a map you can zoom around and explore. Click any spot to see the details, and even check out what it actually looks like with Street View—no need to drive there first to see if it's worth it.

  • Interactive Map: Zoom in, move around, see everything at once
  • Color Coding: The best spots stand out immediately
  • Street View: See what the place actually looks like before you go
  • All the Info: Click any spot to see everything we know about it
  • See the Distance: Understand how far apart different spots are

Figure Out If It's Actually Worth It

Before you drop money on a machine, use our calculator to see if you'll make it back. We'll show you how much you might make, when you'll break even, and what your profits could look like over time. Plug in your numbers and see if the math works out.

  • Revenue Guesses: Best case, worst case, and most likely scenarios
  • Break Even: When you'll finally make back what you spent
  • Long Term Numbers: See how it looks after 1, 3, or 5 years
  • Monthly Breakdown: See your cash flow month by month
  • Your Numbers: Put in your machine cost, rent, and other expenses
  • 5-Year Picture: Total money made, total profit, and monthly averages

How Much Money You Could Actually Make

We'll give you three different revenue estimates—the safe bet, the realistic one, and the dream scenario. Each location gets its own numbers based on how busy it is and what kind of place it is. Plan for the worst, hope for the best.

  • Three Scenarios: Best case, worst case, and most likely
  • Custom to Each Spot: Every location gets numbers that make sense for it
  • Yearly Totals: See what you could make in a full year
  • What Matters: We explain what makes one spot better than another
  • Compare to Others: See how your spot stacks up against typical locations

Compare Spots Side by Side

Can't decide between a few locations? Put them next to each other and see how they stack up. We'll show you the scores, traffic numbers, and what's good or bad about each one. We'll even tell you which one's best for making money, which has the most traffic, or which has the most potential.

  • See Them Together: Look at multiple spots at the same time
  • Compare Everything: Scores, traffic, distance—all in one place
  • Good and Bad: What works and what doesn't for each spot
  • Our Pick: We'll tell you which one's best for what you want
  • Save It: Export your comparison so you can look at it later

Take Your Data With You

Found some great spots? Export everything so you can use it in spreadsheets, show it to partners, or just keep it for your records. All the info about each location comes with it.

  • JSON Format: For developers or if you want to build something with it
  • CSV Format: Open it in Excel or Google Sheets
  • PDF Reports: Make it look nice for presentations or your records
  • Everything Included: All the scores, traffic numbers, and details
  • Export Multiple: Grab data for all your favorite spots at once

Save Your Favorite Spots

Found a spot you like? Save it so you can come back to it later. Organize them into folders, add notes about what you liked, and tag them however makes sense to you. Build your own list of potential locations.

  • Bookmark Spots: Save locations you want to remember
  • Organize: Put them in folders so you can find them later
  • Add Notes: Write down why you liked a spot or what to remember
  • Quick Access: Get back to your saved spots anytime
  • Keep Track: Remember which spots you've already checked out

What Should You Actually Stock?

Not sure what to put in your machine? We'll suggest products based on who's actually walking by. If it's a gym, maybe protein bars. If it's an office, maybe coffee. We'll tell you what's likely to sell based on the location.

  • Custom Suggestions: Different recommendations for each spot
  • Match the Crowd: Products that fit the age group walking by
  • Traffic Matters: Different suggestions for busy vs. quiet spots
  • What Sells: See which product types do best at each location
  • Money Potential: How much each product category could make

See What You're Up Against

Want to know if an area is too crowded with machines or if there's still room for you? We'll show you how saturated the market is, where you stand compared to others, and what opportunities are still out there.

  • How Crowded: Is the area packed or wide open?
  • Your Position: See how you compare to what's already there
  • What's Missing: Find gaps where people want something but can't get it
  • How to Win: Get tips on competing in that area
  • Bigger Picture: Understand what's happening in the market overall

Ready to Find Some Great Spots?

Stop guessing and start finding real locations that actually work. Type in an area and let us show you where people are ready to buy. No more wasted trips or bad locations—just spots that make sense.
